quality.rationale: 考察静止观者四维速度与Killing矢量关系及正交标架下Lie导数的物理意义，需多步概念推导与坐标时到固有时的转换。

origin.question:
Problem 11.10. Consider a family of stationary observers in a stationary spacetime, i.e. their 4-velocity is proportional to the time Killing vector $\pmb{\xi}$ . Each observer arranges his spatial basis vectors so that they connect to the same neighboring observers for all time $t$ , where $\pmb{\xi} =  rac{\partial}{\partial t}$ .
(2) Show that the rate of change of the components of any tensor quantity $Q$ as measured by the stationary observer in units of $t$ , is
$$
\frac {\mathrm {d} Q}{\mathrm {d} t}^{\hat {\alpha} \dot s \hat {\beta}} = (\mathcal {Q}_{\boldsymbol {\xi}} Q)^{\hat {\alpha} \dot s \hat {\beta}}. \text {W h a t i s} \frac {\mathrm {d} Q}{\mathrm {d} \hat {t}}^{\hat {\alpha} \dot s \hat {\beta}}?
$$
origin.answer: \\frac{1}{V} (\\mathcal{L}_{\\pmb{\\xi}} Q)^{\\hat{\\alpha} \\dot s \\hat{\\beta}}，其中 $V=\\sqrt{-\\pmb{\\xi}\\cdot\\pmb{\\xi}}=\\sqrt{-g_{00}}$ 为Killing矢量的归一化因子（引力红移因子）
